title: which bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[2.21-30]
- Add a check to ensure that /proc/5550/exe can be read
  thanks to mbliss@redhat.com for the report and the proposed patch
  Resolves: RHEL-101073
full_text:
[2.21-30]
- Add a check to ensure that /proc/5550/exe can be read
  thanks to mbliss@redhat.com for the report and the proposed patch
  Resolves: RHEL-101073

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20600-0.html
